name: opensource-everything
description: Reference-driven product replication workflow with bundled MCP tools, capture pipelines, and reusable skills.

interface.shortDescription: Clone products from traces and reference captures
interface.longDescription: OpenSource Everything helps Codex turn live product research into traces, fixtures, clone specs, screenshot diffs, and verification reports for disciplined product replication.
defaultPrompt: Summarize this product trace and generate fixtures.
Turn this reference session into a clone spec.
Verify my build against the captured reference.
